title: Biome Music Unlocker
description: Allows biome specific soundtracks to play in more places.
body:
Minecraft has a couple of music tracks that only play in certain biomes, and nowhere else. This resource pack adds tracks that are found in other music sound events to the music.game sound event. As a result, certain tracks that only played in specific biomes can now play elsewhere. The only track that wasn't added is Ancestry, which will still only play in the Deep Dark.

For example: Infinite Amethyst, which you previously can only hear in Dripstone Caves, with this resource pack you can now hear it in Plains, Mushroom Fields, Badlands, etc.

It should be compatible with any sound resource pack as long as it doesn't completely replace the music.game sound event, meaning that you can use this along with [Creative Music](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creative-music).

The tracks in question:
- Aerie
- An Ordinary Day
- Firebugs
- Infinite Amethyst
- Labyrinthine
- Stand Tall
- Wending
